item.title: Demon Lord Reborn - Free Preview Chapter 1
item.description:
Chapter 1: The Fall of the Demon Castle

The cold iron sword pierced his chest, black blood soaking the stone throne. The twelve knights he trusted stood before him, their blades stained with his loyal demon soldiers’ blood.

“I gave you everything,” the Demon Lord whispered, his vision fading fast. “Why?”

“The human empire promised us gold and land,” the lead knight sneered. “Your dark rule ends today.”

As his consciousness slipped away, a faint ancient curse echoed in his soul: I shall return, in flesh weak, power sealed, to burn this world anew.

item.title: Demon Lord Reborn
item.description:
Book Introduction

After being betrayed by his twelve knights, the Demon Lord is reborn in the body of a weak village boy. He must hide his power, gather new followers, and take revenge on the empire that destroyed his kingdom.

Full novel includes 28 chapters, complete ending, no cliffhangers.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
Privacy Policy

  1. Data Collection We do not collect your personal information on this website. All payment data is processed via Payhip, please review Payhip’s privacy policy for transaction details.

  2. Cookies This static website only uses minimal cookies provided by Cloudflare Pages for security and access statistics.

  3. Intellectual Property All novels, cover art and text on this site are original copyrighted works. No reproduction or redistribution without written permission.

  4. Contact For copyright or support inquiries, contact via Payhip store message.
